name: @carbon-dpi/reference-node
description: Reference implementation of a Carbon DPI verification node — full Beckn BPP

scripts.keygen: ts-node -e "const crypto = require('crypto'); const {publicKey, privateKey} = crypto.generateKeyPairSync('ed25519', {publicKeyEncoding:{type:'spki',format:'der'},privateKeyEncoding:{type:'pkcs8',format:'der'}}); console.log('BECKN_ED25519_PUBLIC_KEY='+publicKey.toString('base64')); console.log('BECKN_ED25519_PRIVATE_KEY='+privateKey.toString('base64'));"
scripts.use:postgres: cp prisma/schema.postgres.prisma prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate
scripts.use:sqlite: git checkout prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma generate
